sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43091" key="e(tairo/sunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑταιρ-όσῠνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">friendly, afriend,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.247</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
